title: pilosella niphostribes subsp. lachnocephala
intro: Pilosella niphostribes subsp. lachnocephala, also known as Hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Pilosella niphostribes subsp. lachnocephala include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
